channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 14th May
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Several black bags plus 2 tires, 14th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton

item.title: Graffiti sprayed parking signage - please clean, 14th May
item.description:
3 locations. 15 Fielding Street LP04 (see map attached) and first 2 bay signs on right after entering from Walworth Road. Graffiti sprayed parking signage - please clean.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fielding Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge dumping of waste!, 14th May
item.description:
Please urgently come and remove a huge amount of rubbish that has been dumped overnight along with this commercials bin which is worsening this behaviour. This corner is an ongoing problem, please consider some street furniture, some additional trees to assist with this. This is now a daily occurrence. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobourg Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Datchelor Plus Lime free zone, 14th May
item.description:
User just left their ride on Datchelor Place 8:35am Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Datchelor Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gilmour Close, Enfield

item.category: Barriers, equipment or materials left on the highway

item.title: Black mercedes WL06 AHY, 14th May
item.description:
Car has not moved in months. Flat tyres, windows open. Rubbish inside, left in disrepair.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Venture Close, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Vehicle traffic light signal knocked out of place, 14th May
item.description:
Vehicle traffic light knocked out of place and facing the pedestrian crossing island - see picture. Also the pedestrian crossing light on the adjacent island (facing the building with the black hoardings) is also knocked slightly off centre. This keeps happening here, the crossing lights need setting back from the road..

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 262 - 274, Lewisham High Street, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging on bus shelter outside secondary school, 14th May
item.description:
Tagging on bus shelter outside Royal Trust School.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolwich Road, Charlton Riverside, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fox cub head, 14th May
item.description:
I found this fox cub head on the street of Plover Way adjacent to Onega Gate this morning. I’m not sure how long it has been there, but wish if it can be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plover Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Road, Hackney, London
